sections.sectionTitle: Israel-te' Kiima Om Minam tungah Thukhenna

verses.text: Tekoa khua-a a teng tuucingte lakah Amos a kici mi khat om hi. Uzziah pen Judah kumpi hi-in Joash' tapa Jeroboam in Israel kumpi a sep laitak, zinlin' ma kum nih hun laitakin Pasian in Amos tungah hih thute kilangsak hi
Amos in, “Zion Mual panin Topa hong hawksuk a, Jerusalem khua panin hong awngkek hi. Tua ahih manin lonona gamteng keugawp a, Karmel mualdawn dum dide teng kausan ta hi,” a ci hi.

Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Damaskas khuamite thumvei a khialh khit, a liveina hangin pelloin amaute gim ka pia ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in an gawina suang tawh gawizan bangin, Gilead gammite gawigawp uh hi
Tua ahih manin Hazael innkuante mei tawh ka hal ding a, a meikuang in Kumpi Benhadad' munmuan'huaite kangtum ding hi

Damaskas khuakulhpi zawlte ka sutan ding a, Aven Kuam-a teng mi khempeuh leh Betheden Kuam sungah a om gam ukte khempeuh keimah in ka susia ding a, Syria mite ahih leh Kir gamah salin kipaipih ding hi.

Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Gaza khuamite thumvei a khialh khit, a liveina hangin pelloin amaute gim ka pia ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in minambup khat sal dingin manin, Edom mite tungah ap uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Gaza khuapikulh ka kangsak ding a, a munmuan'huai teng a kangtummang ding hi
Ashdod khuapi-ah a teng mite ka lakhia ding a, Ashkelon khuapi ukte ka beisak ding hi. Ekron khuapi ka sugawp ding a, Filistia mi a omlaite si ding uh hi.

Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Taia khuamite thumvei a khialh khit, a liveina hangin pelloin amaute gim ka pia ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in minambup khat Edom mite tungah ap uh a, lawmta dinga a thuciamna uh zuilo uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Taia khuapikulh ka kangtumsak ding a, a munmuan'huai teng kangtummang ding hi.

Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Edom mite thumvei a khialh khit, a liveina hangin pelloin amaute gim ka pia ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in a sanggam uh Israel-te namsau tawh delh uh a, hehpihna lungsim neilo uh hi. A hehna uh damsak ngeilo uh a, a tawntungin heh niloh uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Teman gamsung khempeuh ka kangtumsak ding a, Bozrah khuapi munmuan'huai teng kangtum ding hi.

Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Ammon mite thumvei a khialh khit, a liveina hangin pelloin amaute gim ka pia ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in huaihamin gam a deihthuah manun Gilead gam simgawp uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Rabbah khuapikulh ka haltum ding a, a munmuan'huai teng khempeuh kangtum ding hi. Galdo-a kikona aw ging ding a, tua kidona awging khuapi huihnung bang ding hi
A kumpipa uh leh a uliante uh salin kiman ding hi.
